servicePage.heroSub: Choose your favorite services to add to your booking
servicePage.ctaSub: Book today and enjoy all 5-star services.

Luxury Mini Bar.name: Luxury Mini Bar
Luxury Mini Bar.description: Premium drinks package with wine, cocktails, fresh juice, and gourmet snacks.

Gourmet Breakfast.name: Gourmet Breakfast
Gourmet Breakfast.description: International breakfast buffet with over 40 dishes and fresh ingredients daily.

Spa & Wellness Center.name: Spa & Wellness Center
Spa & Wellness Center.description: Luxury wellness treatments to restore your body and mind.

Spa & Massage.name: Spa & Massage
Spa & Massage.description: 60-minute relaxing massage therapy with natural essential oils.

Room Service 24/7.name: 24/7 Room Service
Room Service 24/7.description: Enjoy food and beverages delivered to your room anytime.

Private Pool Access.name: Private Pool Access
Private Pool Access.description: Private rooftop infinity pool access for 2 hours.

Infinity Swimming Pool.name: Infinity Swimming Pool
Infinity Swimming Pool.description: Enjoy our luxurious infinity swimming pool.

Fitness & Yoga Class.name: Fitness & Yoga Class
Fitness & Yoga Class.description: Sunrise yoga or private fitness training sessions.

Beach BBQ Dinner.name: Beach BBQ Dinner
Beach BBQ Dinner.description: Private beach BBQ dinner for two with wine and live music.

Room Decoration.name: Room Decoration
Room Decoration.description: Custom room decoration for birthdays, anniversaries, or romantic occasions.

Tour & Sightseeing.name: Tour & Sightseeing
Tour & Sightseeing.description: Guided local sightseeing tours available daily.

Bicycle Rental.name: Bicycle Rental
Bicycle Rental.description: Explore the resort area with our bicycle rental service.

Cocktail & Drinks Package.name: Cocktail & Drinks Package
Cocktail & Drinks Package.description: Handcrafted cocktails served at the pool bar.

Babysitting Service.name: Babysitting Service
Babysitting Service.description: Professional babysitting service for your children.

Photography Session.name: Photography Session
Photography Session.description: Professional photo shoot at the resort’s most beautiful locations.

Sunset Cruise.name: Sunset Cruise
Sunset Cruise.description: Enjoy a luxury sunset cruise with cocktails and snacks.

Cooking Class.name: Cooking Class
Cooking Class.description: Learn local cuisine with our resort chefs.

Pet Care Service.name: Pet Care Service
Pet Care Service.description: Safe and attentive pet care service.

Golf Cart Rental.name: Golf Cart Rental
Golf Cart Rental.description: Electric golf cart rental to explore the resort.

Karaoke Room.name: Karaoke Room
Karaoke Room.description: Private karaoke room with premium sound system.

In-Room Movie Night.name: In-Room Movie Night
In-Room Movie Night.description: Movie package with popcorn, drinks, and cozy blankets.
